    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class applicationMain.FoundationsMain
    Title: FoundationsMain main method that starts up JavaFX
    main(String[]) - Static method in class entityClasses.PostReplyTestingAutomation
    Method: main(String[] args)
    markAsRead(String) - Method in class entityClasses.Post
    Method: void markAsRead(String username)
    markAsRead(String) - Method in class entityClasses.Reply
    Method: void markAsRead(String username)
    MAX_BODY_LENGTH - Static variable in class entityClasses.Post
    Maximum number of characters allowed in a post body (~2,000 words).
    MAX_BODY_LENGTH - Static variable in class entityClasses.Reply
    Maximum number of characters allowed in a reply body (~1,000 words).
    MAX_TITLE_LENGTH - Static variable in class entityClasses.Post
    Maximum number of characters allowed in a post title.
    middleName - Variable in class database.Database.UserDetails
    The middle name of this user.
